name: Kull N Claude Auto Sales
notes: Site runs on Carsforsale.com platform (URL pattern /cars-for-sale with CFS category IDs, dealer ID d646875 on carsforsale.com). DataDome bot protection (HTTP 403, x-datadome header) blocks all direct HTTP access including with browser UA and JSON Accept headers. Carsforsale.com also blocks with captcha challenge. AutosToday aggregator shows inventoryCount=0 for this dealer. MyNextRide (dealer 10981) renders inventory via Livewire (Laravel) JS-only, no server-side data. Search snippets mention 5 vehicles but cannot verify currency or prices without JS execution. Dealer explicitly states 'quality over quantity' and small inventory.
